allow: PowerShell($wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; try { $content = $wc.DownloadString\("http://localhost:3000/videos/vc1"\); $content.Substring\(0,500\) } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $stream = $resp.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\).Substring\(0,500\) })

PowerShell($wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; try { $wc.DownloadString\("http://localhost:3000/api/video-categories"\) } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; "HTTP $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\)"; $stream = $resp.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\).Substring\(0,300\) })

PowerShell($r = try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/videos/vc1" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 } catch { $_.Exception.Response }; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host \($r.Content | Select-String "notFound|error|404|title" | Select-Object -First 5\))

PowerShell($r = try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 } catch { $_.Exception.Response }; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host \($r.Content | Select-String "<title" | Select-Object -First 2\))

PowerShell($body = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Admin\\.claude\\projects\\e--Ai-prompt\\eab3537f-f106-4a82-864c-5fe0626cf218\\tool-results\\bflugr3h8.txt" -Raw; [regex]::Matches\($body, '\(?i\)\(404|this page|could not be found|notfound|page-not-found\)[^<]{0,50}'\) | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value })
PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d e:\\Ai-prompt && npm run dev > e:\\Ai-prompt\\dev-server.log 2>&1" -WindowStyle Hidden)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/api/placeholder/test-seed/400/300" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\), Content-Type: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\), Size: $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes")

PowerShell(taskkill /PID 17832 /F 2>$null; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -eq "node" } | ForEach-Object { $conn = netstat -ano | Select-String ":300" | Where-Object { $_ -match $_.Id }; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force } }; Write-Host "Done")

PowerShell($r = try { Invoke-WebRequest "https://picsum.photos/seed/test/400/300" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8 } catch { $null }; if \($r\) { Write-Host "picsum OK: $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.RawContent.Length\) bytes\)" } else { Write-Host "picsum UNREACHABLE" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Port 3000 cleared")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "E:\\ai-prompt-old\\aiprompt\\.next" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Ready — run: cd E:\\ai-prompt-old\\aiprompt && npm run dev")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "E:\\Ai-prompt\\.next" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Done")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "E:\\Ai-prompt\\.next" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Stopped & cleared")
